5004.issue: [S5004] Plain setInterval() found in source files (main.js). Please use this.setInterval() or adapter.setInterval() instead.

5005.issue: [S5005] Plain setTimeout() found in source files (main.js). Please use this.setTimeout() or adapter.setTimeout() instead.

5601.issue: [S5601] i18n directory "admin/i18n" uses long format ({lang}/translations.json). Consider migrating to short format ({lang}.json) using "npm run translate convert".

5606.issue: [W5606] i18n "admin/i18n" seems to contain untranslated entries identical to English (>5 words). Affected languages: es (2 keys, examples: Steam Name Help, Steam API Setup Info); fr (2 keys, examples: Steam Name Help, Steam API Setup Info); it (2 keys, examples: Steam Name Help, Steam API Setup Info); nl (2 keys, examples: Steam Name Help, Steam API Setup Info); pl (2 keys, examples: Steam Name Help, Steam API Setup Info); pt (2 keys, examples: Steam Name Help, Steam API Setup Info); ru (2 keys, examples: Steam Name Help, Steam API Setup Info); uk (2 keys, examples: Steam Name Help, Steam API Setup Info); zh (2 keys, examples: Steam Name Help, Steam API Setup Info).

5612.issue: [W5612] "admin/jsonConfig.json/items/games/items/getOwnedGames" attribute "tooltip" uses key "Load games owned by this Steam account" which is not found in the English translation file at "admin/i18n/en".
